titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 38: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 38. (A.R. No. B 352 of 1925.) PAḺAṄKŌYIL, POLUR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Phalagrāhīśvara temple.

This is written in very faulty language and is incomplete. A portion of the record is in slightly different writing and hence possibly it may not be genuine. It states that while the king (uḍaiyār) Uttamachōḻa was staying in his palace at Kāñchīpuram, Kampaṉ Irāmaṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa-Piridigaṅgaraiyar, the chief of Paṅgaḷanāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam made a representation to the former and got the village Ōdiyampaḷḷam in Pudanāḍippāḍi in his jurisdictional nāḍu and endowed as a sarvamānyaiṟaiyili to the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruppalaṅgōḷūr with the details of the requirements defined for the several services in the temple, to be derived out of the lands. It also mentions the necessary irrigational facilities to be made available for these lands. Reference is made to two Officers Ulahaṉ Gaṇḍarādittan alias Mīnava Mūvēndavēḷāṉ as vāśalkēḻvi and Paḻuvūr Nakkaṉ alias Vikkiramachōḷa-Mārāyaṉ, another official (Intelligence chief ?).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 169.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu paṅkaḷanāṭu Uṭaiya kampaṉ nirāmanākiya Uttamacoḻap piruti kaṅkaraiyaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār Uttamacoḻar kāñcipurattu koyilil kiḻaimurippil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkaiyil Emperumāṉ Eṉṉāṭṭu putanāṭappāṭi tiruppaḻaṅkoḷur mahādevarkku putanāṭappāṭi Otiyampaḷḷam Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka prasādikkaveṇum Eṉṟu viṇ
Ulahaṉ kaṇṭarātittanākiya miṉavamuventaveḷāṉ vācalkeḻviyālum paḻuvūr nakkanākiya vikkiramacoḻamārāyaṉ ñāṉattiṉālum prasādam peṟṟut toṇṭaināṭṭu variyiliṟaiyiḻicci (variyili) variyiliṭuvittu taṉakkut tampāṭiyuṭaiya Āṉātaveṭanākaya vikramacoḻabamahamatāṅka (brahmāta ?)rāyaṉ viṇṇappattinālum Ivoṭakkamāṉa viranārāyaṇan vāykkeḻviyālum Aiññūṟṟuvaṉ ñāṉattiṉālum
tirupaḻaṅkoḷur mahātevaṟku Iṟaiyilitevatāṉamāka Udakapūrvamākac ceytu kuṭutteṉ Uttamacoḻap pirutikaṅ karaiyaṉeṉ Itukku kiḻpāṟkellai ṉantai toṇṭaipūṇṭiyār teṟkunokkip poṉavatikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pullūr vāykkālukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai tattappāṭi Ellaikku kiḻakkum pullūrerikkup pāynta Ūṟṟukkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ceyyāṟṟukkut teṟkum nāṟpāṟkellaiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam
Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka ceytu kuṭutteṉ Itukku pullūrerikku pāya Ikkāli nirkaḻanikku Iṟaittup pāyappeṟuvatākavum paḻaṅkoḷur Ūṟṟum Erinirum ceykku pāykiṟa vāykkālum Itu koṭu nirum cemmāpaṭāta varivatu paḻaṅkoḷur muṉṉum Arapuccaṉdogam kaṭikaikaḷattuk kolāl kiḻaikal kuttu pulamiraṇṭāyiramum melai murukkaṉpulam Āyiramum Āka mūvāyiram kuḻiyum kiḻaippulattu vaṭakkippa
Icaipāli pala pāvumāccaṉ tericaṉamāka Aṟccippatākavum paḻaṅkoḷḷur muṉṉuḷḷa vaṭakālamāṉapiṉpum vaṭapa puṉceyppāl Otiyum paḷḷattu kaḻaṉikku paḻaṅkoyillāyp pāynta kālukku vaṭakku Āṟepāyal koṇṭu tirunantāviḷakkukku nitta muḻakku ney Erittu cipilikku kaiccekkukku Eṇṇaiyāṭṭuvatākavum paḻaṅkoḷurāṉ Uḷḷa cipili dogava [ bhogaṅ?] kiḻ kāṭṭa kāl ceṟuvum Erivāypulamāka
meṟpaṭi kollāl Āṟāyiraṅkuḻi koṇṭu Āṟāṉ muṉṟu saṅkayum tiruppaḷḷieḻucci koṭṭuvatākavum Oṟṟaic caṅku Oṉṟūtuvatākavum paḻaṅkoḷur muṉṉuḷḷa tiruviḻāviragam meṟpaṭi ko(l)lāl Āyirattuññūṟu kuḻiyuṅ koṇṭu maṇuṭaiyāṉ nicatam Oru tiruvamutu pāṉaiyum kaṟiccaṭṭiyum kuṭamum kaṭām kalacamum kulatāca Āṭa Iṉopetapaḷḷam koṇṭu potu Amutukku potuḷḷa Arici Āka kuttal paṉ
la muppatu nāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu toṉṟilukku niccayitta nallatāpariyum tayi(r)ramutu poturiyāka niccayitta nellu muṉṉāḻiyum patiṉṉāḻi nellu potu muṉṟukku ney muḻākkukku nel muppaniṉṉāḻiyum kapūuvari vārāmkku ney Uḻaikkaraikku nellu patiṉṉaññāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu potu nāllāka paṉṉiraṇṭu veṟṟilaiyumThe inscription stops here. The continuation of the piece on the first tier is wanting. The piece on the 2nd tier are in different writing and faulty.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
